title: clematis heracleifolia subsp. savatieri
intro: Clematis heracleifolia subsp. savatieri is a plant species of the Clematis genus, native to China and Japan, characterized by its white or pinkish-purple flowers and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Clematis heracleifolia subsp. savatieri include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to create teas, salves, and other remedies.
